eventName: Antiques Vintage & Collectables Fair 25 Aug Handicap

parameters.{0}: Antiques Vintage & Collectables Fair 25 Aug Handicap

metadata.rpDiomedComment: Not disgraced in last two starts and could have a say dropped slightly in grade
John Egan replaces 7lb amateur in the saddle; not dismissed lightly
Solid efforts in his last two turf starts; should be thereabouts again
Infrequent winner but in solid form and likes it here; one of the likelier contenders
Looked down to a workable mark at Windsor last time; wouldn't need much more to win this

metadata.rpDiomedVerdict: The 5lb claim of up-and-coming apprentice Cieren Fallon may help BIG TIME MAYBE land a first turf victory but it wouldn't be a surprise to see any of these come out on top, with Glamorous Rocket and Ghepardo in fair form, Pink Iceburg looking on the way back recently and The Lacemaker likely to benefit from the assistance of a professional jockey taking over. Glamorous Rocket may claim second.

eventName: Celtic Contracts Handicap

metadata.rpDiomedComment: Wind surgery needs to have had significant impact
Last win came off 9lb higher but hard to fancy on recent endeavours
Capable off today's mark but not easy to recommend in current heart
Capable off today's mark but a suspicion that today's trip just stretches his stamina
0-25 and still not sure trip suits; enough doubts to overcome following long absence
Ran well in defeat this year and looks capable off her current mark at this level
In good form on turf recently but his AW record does raise a doubt for today
Drops in grade but was tailed off on his handicap debut latest and makes little appeal
Promising start for this yard latest and this unexposed sort looks interesting up in trip
Needs to find a bit more to score but holds frame claims
Struggled all five starts and best watched until showing something more promising
In good form on the AW recently and capable of going well again
Upped 3lb for latest Windsor second but likely he still has some scope from today's mark
A few questions to answer but unexposed and dangerous to write her off in first-time visor

metadata.rpDiomedVerdict: In an open contest it might be worth taking a chance on unexposed 3yo HOOFLEPUFF. The selection shaped encouragingly on his first start for this yard when staying-on third over 9.4f at Wolverhampton and may well improve over today's longer trip. Aria Rose also comes here on the back of a solid run on his initial outing for new connections and is next best ahead of Givepeaceachance and Croeso Cymreag who have also been running well of late.
